accounts.what_is_a_memo_desciption:
If you're sending funds to a Stellar Address, it is important to include a MEMO if the recipient requires a MEMO. The MEMO acts as an important reference for the receiving party to detect any incoming payments and or deposits for crediting your balance. 

 If you do not include a MEMO when it is required by the recipient, you can lose your funds.
accounts.what_is_a_federation_address_description:
Stellar makes it easy for third party wallet providers to embed the MEMO in a human readable address format, similar to that of an email address. The only difference is that the @ symbol is replaced with a * symbol, e.g.

username*domain.com

It is important to make sure that you are sending funds to a valid federated address.
accounts.how_do_on_chain_transactions_work: How do on chain transactions work?
accounts.how_do_on_chain_transactions_work_descri:
If you're sending funds to a Stellar Address it means that the transaction will be broadcasted to the Stellar Network.

There is usually a small network fee in XLM that will either be passed on to you as the user, or be absorbed by the organization.

You'll be notified if the fee will be applied to your XLM account or not.

You'll also be able to copy and/or click on the transaction hash to view the transaction chain details after it is broadcasted to the network.

It is important to note that on chain transactions can't be reversed.

Please choose the type of multi-factor authentication you would like to activate on your account.

help.i_dont_know_how_to_deposit: I don't know how to deposit
help.manual_deposit_text: A manual deposit is depositing funds from your bank via EFT. Follow the steps below to deposit funds to your wallet:
help.manual_deposit_step_1: On the homescreen, swipe to the currency you wish to deposit to and select the Deposit action. You may have to tap the More button if Deposit is not 1 of the main actions
help.manual_deposit_step_2: Open your banking app or online banking to create an EFT to the account details provided
help.manual_deposit_warning: Be sure to include the exact reference code by tapping to copy the code.
help.deposit_not_reflecting_text: Deposits may take up to 5 business days to reflect once your deposit was successful.
help.deposit_not_reflecting_manual: Once we’ve received your deposit and you’ve used the correct reference number, your deposit will reflect in your wallet after it has been processed.
help.how_do_i_add_crypto_to_my_wallet: How do I add crypto to my wallet?
help.how_do_i_add_crypto_to_my_wallet_text: To deposit crypto into your wallet you can either **Exchange** or **Receive** it from another wallet.
help.add_crypto_exchange_step_0: To Exchange crypto follow the following steps:
help.add_crypto_exchange_step_1: On the homescreen, swipe to the currency you wish to exchange and select the Exchange action. You may have to tap the More button if it is not 1 of the main actions
help.add_crypto_exchange_step_2: Select the currency you wish to sell and the currency you wish to purchase
help.add_crypto_exchange_step_3: Select the amount you wish to sell
help.add_crypto_receive_step_0: To Receive crypto from another wallet:
help.add_crypto_receive_step_1: On the homescreen, swipe to the currency you wish to exchange and select the Receive action
help.add_crypto_receive_step_2: Scan the QR code from your other wallet to send funds across your wallets or copy your address to your clipboard. You can enter your address in a different wallet to send funds from one wallet to another
help.i_dont_know_how_to_withdraw: I don't know how to withdraw
help.manual_withdraw_text: After withdrawing funds, your withdrawal will go into a pending state. The administrator will attempt to manually add your account as a beneficiary and make the withdrawal.
help.manual_deposit_md:
## Manual deposit

A manual deposit is depositing funds from your bank via EFT. Follow the steps below to deposit funds to your wallet:

1. On the homescreen, swipe to the currency you wish to deposit to and select the Deposit action. You may have to tap the More button if Deposit is not 1 of the main actions
2. Open your banking app or online banking to create an EFT to the account details provided
help.how_do_i_add_a_bank_account: How do I add a bank account?
help.how_do_i_add_a_bank_account_steps_0: To add a new bank account in Deposit do the following:
help.how_do_i_add_a_bank_account_steps_1: On the homescreen, swipe to your USD currency and select the Deposit action. You may have to tap the More button if it is not 1 of the main actions
help.how_do_i_add_a_bank_account_steps_2: In Deposit select the “Add new account” button at the bottom of your screen
help.how_do_i_add_a_bank_account_steps_5: Once you have selected your bank, please provide your banking credentials to enable Plaid to retrieve your financial information. This will link your bank account to the wallet
help.how_do_i_add_a_bank_account_steps_6: Select your account  retrieved by Plaid and continue to the app. This will link your bank account to the wallet
help.how_do_i_add_a_bank_account_conclusiokn: Your bank account will now show on your list of linked accounts.

account.what_is_a_memo_desciption:
If you're sending funds to a Stellar Address, it is important to include a MEMO if the recipient requires a MEMO. The MEMO acts as an important reference for the receiving party to detect any incoming payments and or deposits for crediting your balance. 

 If you do not include a MEMO when depositing funds to this address, your balance will not be credited.**
account.what_is_a_federation_address_description:
Stellar makes it easy for third party wallet providers to embed the MEMO in a human readable address format, similar to that of an email address. The only difference is that the @ symbol is replaced with a * symbol, e.g.

username*domain.com

It is important to make sure that you are sending funds to a valid federated address.
account.how_do_on_chain_transactions_work: How do on chain transactions work?
account.how_do_on_chain_transactions_work_descri:
If you're sending funds to a Stellar Address it means that the transaction will be broadcasted to the Stellar Network.

There is usually a small network fee in XLM that will either be passed on to you as the user, or be absorbed by the organization.

You'll be notified if the fee will be applied to your XLM account or not.

You'll also be able to copy and/or click on the transaction hash to view the transaction chain details after it is broadcasted to the network.

It is important to note that on chain transactions can't be reversed.
